title: bidens exigua
intro: Bidens exigua, also known as the narrow-leaved beggar-ticks, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Bidens exigua include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of Bidens exigua include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
